Who I Am

Passionate about how systems think

I'm an IT student specialising in Communication Networks, with a growing passion for cybersecurity, software development, and the intersection of both disciplines.

I thrive on understanding how systems work from the inside out. Whether that means analysing packets in Wireshark, building web applications from scratch, or competing in Capture The Flag challenges as part of a blue team.

My long-term goal is to work in cybersecurity and advanced technology environments on an international level.
